subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! The Sacred Lote-Tree existeth and His grace is manifest. Hold thou fast unto it with such firmness that the winds of allusions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی سدره مبارکه موجود و عنایتش مشهود تمسک نما بان تمسکیکه اریاح اشارات
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
